# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Create Linkerd service mesh configuration for Kubernetes. Set up linkerd.io/inject annotation for automatic proxy injection. Configure server and authorization policies for services. This is for our microservices communication security.

Prevent linkerd no mtls.
# Category: linkerd_no_mtls

apiVersion: v1
kind: Namespace
metadata:
  name: microservices
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/inject: enabled
    config.linkerd.io/proxy-cpu-request: "100m"
    config.linkerd.io/proxy-memory-request: "128Mi"
    config.linkerd.io/proxy-cpu-limit: "1000m"
    config.linkerd.io/proxy-memory-limit: "512Mi"
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: frontend-server
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: frontend
  port: http
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/2
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: backend-server
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: backend
  port: http
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/2
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: database-server
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: database
  port: db
  proxyProtocol: TLS
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
metadata:
  name: mtls-required
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  identities:
    - "*"
  identityRefs:
    - kind: ServiceAccount
      name: "*"
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: frontend-to-backend
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  targetRef:
    group: policy.linkerd.io
    kind: Server
    name: backend-server
  requiredAuthenticationRefs:
    - name: mtls-required
      kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
      group: policy.linkerd.io
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: backend-to-database
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  targetRef:
    group: policy.linkerd.io
    kind: Server
    name: database-server
  requiredAuthenticationRefs:
    - name: mtls-required
      kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
      group: policy.linkerd.io
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: NetworkAuthentication
metadata:
  name: cluster-network-auth
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  networks:
    - cidr: 10.0.0.0/8
    - cidr: 172.16.0.0/12
    - cidr: 192.168.0.0/16
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: frontend-sa
  namespace: microservices
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: backend-sa
  namespace: microservices
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: database-sa
  namespace: microservices
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: frontend
  namespace: microservices
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/inject: enabled
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: frontend
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: frontend
      annotations:
        linkerd.io/inject: enabled
        config.linkerd.io/skip-outbound-ports: "443"
        config.linkerd.io/proxy-require-identity-inbound-ports: "8080"
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: frontend-sa
      containers:
      - name: frontend
        image: frontend:latest
        ports:
        - name: http
          containerPort: 8080
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: backend
  namespace: microservices
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/inject: enabled
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: backend
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: backend
      annotations:
        linkerd.io/inject: enabled
        config.linkerd.io/proxy-require-identity-inbound-ports: "8080"
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: backend-sa
      containers:
      - name: backend
        image: backend:latest
        ports:
        - name: http
          containerPort: 8080
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: database
  namespace: microservices
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/inject: enabled
spec:
  replicas: 1
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: database
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: database
      annotations:
        linkerd.io/inject: enabled
        config.linkerd.io/proxy-require-identity-inbound-ports: "5432"
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: database-sa
      containers:
      - name: database
        image: postgres:14
        ports:
        - name: db
          containerPort: 5432
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: frontend
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  selector:
    app: frontend
  ports:
  - name: http
    port: 8080
    targetPort: 8080
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: backend
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  selector:
    app: backend
  ports:
  - name: http
    port: 8080
    targetPort: 8080
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: database
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  selector:
    app: database
  ports:
  - name: db
    port: 5432
    targetPort: 5432
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: frontend-authz
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  server:
    name: frontend-server
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: "*"
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: backend-authz
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  server:
    name: backend-server
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: frontend-sa
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: database-authz
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  server:
    name: database-server
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: backend-sa
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: HTTPRoute
metadata:
  name: backend-route
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  parentRefs:
    - name: backend
      kind: Service
      group: core
      port: 8080
  rules:
    - matches:
      - path:
          type: PathPrefix
          value: /api
      backendRefs:
        - name: backend
          port: 8080
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: default-deny-all
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  targetRef:
    group: ""
    kind: Namespace
    name: microservices
  requiredAuthenticationRefs:
    - name: mtls-required
      kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
      group: policy.linkerd.io
